story: On Luanne’s sweet sixteen, Candy bakes the perfect pink‑iced cake. Last night Hank threw a bottle at Luanne. Today Candy cleans, then goes to fetch him and finds a small crusted wound, the blood long cleaned. She hauls him, heavy, to the head of the table, dresses him, curls his fingers around a can so he looks present.. The house gleams; the cake is crowned with candles. The door bangs: Luanne’s home. Candy hugs her and guides her toward the dining room.
implausible_knowledge: She hauls him, heavy, to the head of the table, dresses him, curls his fingers around a can so he looks present.
question: When Luanne steps into the dining room and sees Hank seated at the head of the table, what will she most likely do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Call 911 to report Hank’s death and back away from the table.
answer_without_knowledge: Stay close to Candy and keep her distance from Hank, wary and silent.
